scenarios.description: Calling isFormSubmittable() on a cloned known form-submittable tag (uppercase OUTPUT with preserve-case) returns true
scenarios.path: B0→B1(tag from first map null)→B3(tag from normalName map)→B5(clone path)→B8(return true)
scenarios.precondition: ParseSettings.preserveCase = true; Tags contains 'output' with formSubmit=true
pseudocode: // Assert clone path taken and formSubmit true

scenarios.description: Calling isFormSubmittable() on a known form-submittable tag via normalName lookup (uppercase OPTION with lower-case settings) returns true
scenarios.path: B0→B1(tag from first map null)→B3(tag from normalName map)→B4(no clone)→B8(return true)
pseudocode: ParseSettings settings = new ParseSettings(false); // preserveTagCase = false
// Assert normalName lookup path taken and formSubmit true
